title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXLIX. Games.
content:
This is the way the ladies ride;
                Tri, tre, tre, tree,
                Tri, tre, tre, tree!
        This is the way the ladies ride,
                Tri, tre, tre, tre, tri-tre-tre-tree!

        This is the way the gentlemen ride;
                Gallop-a-trot,
                Gallop-a-trot!
        This is the way the gentlemen ride,
                Gallop-a-gallop-a-trot!

        This is the way the farmers ride;
                Hobbledy-hoy,
                Hobbledy-hoy!
        This is the way the farmers ride,
                Hobbledy hobbledy-hoy!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXLIX. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
